name: Four-Chamber Heart
institution: Karlsruhe Institute of Technology, Institute of Biomedical Engineering (KIT IBT)
Karlsruhe Institute of Technology, Institute of Applied and Numerical Mathematics (KIT IANM)
description: Four-chamber human heart model segmented from MRI of a healthy volunteer. Mechanical mesh and electrophysiology mesh. Fully coupled multi-physics model: electrophysiology, mechanics, and closed-loop circulation.
